videoSnippet.title: The Elevator Blessing || Fabiano Caruana vs Anish Giri || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R9

Caruana, Fabiano (2795) - Giri, Anish (2753) 
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.04.08
C50 Giuoco Piano

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Bc5 4.O-O Nf6 5.d3 O-O 6.Nbd2 d6 7.c3 a5 8.h3 Be6 9.Bb5 Ba7 10.Re1 Ne7 11.d4 Ng6 12.Bd3 Nh5 13.Nf1 Nhf4 14.Ng3 Nxd3 15.Qxd3 a4 16.d5 Bd7 17.Bg5 f6 18.Be3 Bxe3 19.fxe3 b5 20.b4 axb3 21.axb3 Qb8 22.c4 Qb6 23.Nf5 Rfe8 24.N3h4 b4 25.Kh2 Ra3 26.Rab1 Ra2 27.Qd1 Nxh4 28.Nxh4 Rea8 29.Re2 Qa7 30.Rc1 Qb6 31.Nf3 h6 32.Ne1 Kh7 33.Rxa2 Rxa2 34.Nc2 Be8 35.Qd3 Bg6 36.Ra1 Rxa1 37.Nxa1 c5 38.Kg3 Qa7 39.Qb1 h5 40.Kf3 h4 41.Kg4 Qe7 42.Qd3 f5+ 43.exf5 Kh6
